
| ID | Hypothesis | Capability | Evidence | Conclusion | Health | Current reading |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **GH-LRN** | **Learning and performance** | partial | mechanism | not_tested | current | T1/T2 show no basic binding advantage; graph-native T3 mechanisms exist, but the decisive independent comparison has not run. |
| **GH-VER** | **Verification and assurance** | implemented | internal_pilot | not_tested | current | Strong bounded mechanism evidence exists in the kernel, certificate replay, mutation tests, and differential checker; external utility is untested. |
| **GH-AUD** | **Auditability and provenance** | implemented | internal_pilot | not_tested | current | Strong mechanism evidence exists; comparative operational and human studies remain open. |
| **GH-EXP** | **Faithful explainability and contestability** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | Partial mechanism support exists; human comprehension, calibration, and actionability are untested. |
| **GH-CHL** | **Challengeability and repair** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | A bounded discovery-and-revision mechanism exists; there is no externally valid comparative result. |
| **GH-GOV** | **Governance and authority separation** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | Application and architectural mechanisms exist; organizational effectiveness is untested. |
| **GH-INT** | **Interoperability and model independence** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | Multiple ports and representations are implemented; portability across independent ecosystems is untested. |
| **GH-HMI** | **Human-machine inquiry** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | Bounded inquiry mechanisms exist; comparative human evidence is absent. |
| **GH-DBG** | **Debuggability and forensics** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | The mechanism is partly embodied in traces and the rejection taxonomy; an operational study is needed. |
| **GH-SAF** | **Safe automation and change control** | implemented | internal_pilot | not_tested | current | The core verification mechanism exists; domain-specific safety and cost evidence is untested. |
| **GH-EPI** | **Epistemic discipline** | implemented | mechanism | not_tested | current | The discipline is implemented in experiment and inquiry designs; its effect on real decisions is untested. |
| **GH-EFF** | **Computational practicality** | specified | mechanism | not_tested | current | Resource accounting exists in parts of the harness, but no general efficiency claim is supported. |
